data.name: Rustomjee BigQuery - Collections- 2 - Incentive Credit copy

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  KUNNR,
  FKDAT,
  PAY_DATE,
  paid_status,
  today_delta_additions,
  DATE_DIFF(DATE(PAY_DATE), DATE(FKDAT), DAY) AS diff_days,
  CASE
    WHEN DATE_DIFF(DATE(PAY_DATE), DATE(FKDAT), DAY) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '0_5'
    WHEN DATE_DIFF(DATE(PAY_DATE), DATE(FKDAT), DAY) BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6_10'
  END AS payment_bucket
FROM
  `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.collections_demand_groupby`
WHERE
  paid_status IN ('Fully Paid')
  AND FKDAT IS NOT NULL
  AND PAY_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE_DIFF(DATE(PAY_DATE), DATE(FKDAT), DAY) BETWEEN 0 AND 10

nodes.name: Fetching Details of the Fully and Partially Paid Customers

parameters.content:
Sample Payload -
Unique Identifier -
customer_id = KUNNR
today_delta_additions

{
  "customer_code": "471882",
  "demand_date": "2024-06-25",
  "payment_date": "2024-06-25",
  "today_delta_additions": null,
  "diff_days": 0,
  "amount": 6000,
  "remarks": "Paid within 5 days",
  "transaction_note": "Credit points for payment done within 5 days of demand",
  "payment_mode": "cash",
  "topup_by": "automation"
}

today_delta_additions

  "demand_date": "2024-07-16",
  "payment_date": "2024-07-23",
  "today_delta_additions": null,
  "diff_days": 7,
  "amount": 3000,
  "remarks": "Paid within 10 days",
  "transaction_note": "Credit points for payment done withing 10 days of demand",
  "payment_mode": "cash",
  "topup_by": "automation"
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
);

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  KUNNR,
  FKDAT,
  PAY_DATE,
  paid_status,
  today_delta_additions
FROM
  `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.collections_demand_groupby`
WHERE
  paid_status IN ('Fully Paid', 'Partially Paid')
  AND FKDAT IS NOT NULL
  AND PAY_DATE IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 100000

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
);

DELETE FROM wallet_transaction_logs
WHERE remarks = 'Paid within 10 days';

CREATE TABLE wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code TEXT,
    points NUMERIC,
    remarks TEXT,
    reference_id TEXT,
    transaction_note TEXT,

    status TEXT,
    status_code INTEGER,
    message TEXT,

    request_payload JSONB,
    response_payload JSONB,

    execution_id TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
